name: Larsen Press (Barbell)
instructions: Bench press variation with feet elevated. Lower bar to chest, press up.

name: Svend Press
instructions: Hold plates together at chest. Press straight out, squeeze chest, return.

name: Floor Press (Barbell)
instructions: Lie on floor, press bar to lockout. Limits range for tricep focus.

name: Floor Press (Dumbbell)
instructions: Lie on floor with dumbbells. Press up, elbows touch floor each rep.

name: Low to High Cable Flye
instructions: Cables at low position. Bring handles up and together targeting upper chest.

name: High to Low Cable Flye
instructions: Cables at high position. Bring handles down and together targeting lower chest.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Barbell anchored at one end. Press bar overhead from shoulder.

name: Landmine Row (Single Arm)
instructions: Barbell anchored at one end. Row bar to hip, elbow close to body.

name: Landmine Squat
instructions: Barbell anchored at one end, hold at chest. Squat down, drive up.

name: Landmine Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Barbell anchored at one end. Hinge at hips, feel hamstring stretch.

name: Landmine Twist
instructions: Barbell anchored at one end. Rotate bar side to side from chest.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Cable at chest height. Press out resisting rotation, hold, return.

name: Cable Woodchop (High to Low)
instructions: Cable high, pull down and across body in chopping motion.

name: Cable Woodchop (Low to High)
instructions: Cable low, pull up and across body in lifting motion.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back. Lower opposite arm/leg toward floor, keep core braced.

name: Bird Dog
instructions: On hands and knees. Extend opposite arm and leg, hold, return.

name: Stir the Pot
instructions: Plank on stability ball. Move arms in circular motion.

name: Body Saw
instructions: Forearm plank. Rock body forward and back maintaining plank.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat (Single Arm)
instructions: Rear foot elevated, hold one dumbbell. Single-side loading for core challenge.

name: Spanish Squat
instructions: Band behind knees, heels elevated. Squat emphasizing quads.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Back against wall, thighs parallel to floor. Hold position.

name: Nordic Curl
instructions: Kneel, anchor feet. Lower torso forward with control, hamstrings engaged.

name: Reverse Nordic
instructions: Kneel upright. Lean back with control, quads engaged, return.

name: Step-Up (Dumbbell)
instructions: Step onto box or bench, drive through heel, step down with control.

name: Calf Press (Leg Press Machine)
instructions: In leg press, press with balls of feet. Full range calf raises.

name: Seal Row
instructions: Lie prone on elevated bench. Row bar to lower chest, no body english.

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Landmine setup. Stand perpendicular, row bar to hip with one arm.

name: Gorilla Row
instructions: Hinged position, two dumbbells on floor. Alternate rowing each side.

name: Chest-Supported Row (Dumbbell)
instructions: Chest on incline bench. Row dumbbells to hips, eliminate momentum.

name: Egyptian Lateral Raise
instructions: Lean to side. Raise dumbbell from hanging position to overhead.

name: Lu Raise
instructions: Front raise to overhead, then lower behind head. Full shoulder rotation.

name: Around the World (Shoulders)
instructions: Light weight. Circle arms from front to sides to back continuously.

name: Cuban Press
instructions: Upright row, rotate to front rack, press overhead. Multi-plane movement.

name: Trap 3 Raise
instructions: Lie prone on bench. Raise arms in Y position targeting lower traps.

name: Spider Curl
instructions: Chest on vertical side of preacher bench. Curl with arms hanging straight.

name: Zottman Curl
instructions: Curl with supinated grip. Rotate to pronated at top, lower slowly.

name: Overhead Cable Curl
instructions: Cables at shoulder height. Curl handles toward head, bicep peak contraction.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Cable high behind head. Extend arms overhead, control return.

name: JM Press
instructions: Hybrid between close-grip press and skull crusher. Powerful tricep builder.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Hold one end each hand. Create waves, alternating or simultaneous.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Push weighted sled, lean forward, drive through legs.

name: Sled Pull
instructions: Attach rope to sled. Walk backward pulling sled toward you.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Jump onto box, land softly. Step down with control.

name: Farmer Carry
instructions: Hold heavy weights at sides. Walk with upright posture and braced core.
